description: 15 new diverse IT scenarios — Set C (LLD-aligned framing)

cases.title: Internal DNS Resolution Failure
cases.description: Users cannot resolve internal hostnames such as jira.corp.local and gitlab.corp.local. DNS lookup times out on corporate Wi-Fi and VPN. nslookup returns SERVFAIL for all internal zones.

cases.title: Vendor IP Firewall Whitelist
cases.description: Need to whitelist vendor IP 203.0.113.45 on the perimeter firewall so our payment gateway integration can reach their API. Standard firewall rule change request.

cases.title: Printer Paper Jam - Floor 2
cases.description: HP LaserJet on the 2nd floor copy room shows paper jam error E3 and will not print. Users cannot clear the jam from the panel.

cases.title: Laptop Overheating and Fan Noise
cases.description: Company Dell laptop runs very hot with constant fan noise. Thermal throttling causes shutdowns during video calls. Suspect dust-clogged vents or failing fan.

cases.title: Docker Desktop Engine Blocked
cases.description: Docker Desktop will not start after Windows update. Error: hardware-assisted virtualization and HVCI are blocking the Linux engine. Cannot run local containers for development.

cases.title: Teams Screen Share Black Screen
cases.description: Microsoft Teams screen sharing shows a black screen to participants on Windows 11. Camera and microphone work fine. Desktop client issue after the latest Teams update.

cases.title: SAP GUI Session Timeout Loop
cases.description: SAP GUI logs users out every 5 minutes with session timeout even during active data entry. Backend session persistence appears broken in the SAP client connector.

cases.title: Ransomware Alert on Workstation
cases.description: Security incident: CrowdStrike detected ransomware encryption activity on workstation WS-FIN-042. Multiple files renamed with .locked extension. Isolate host immediately.

cases.title: Production API Key Leaked to GitHub
cases.description: Developer accidentally pushed production AWS secret access key to a public GitHub repository. Security incident — need credential rotation and git history purge immediately.

cases.title: PostgreSQL Replica Lag Critical
cases.description: PostgreSQL read replica lag exceeded 45 minutes during peak load. Reporting dashboards show stale data. Suspect replication slot backlog on the primary database server.

cases.title: Nightly Backup Verification Failed
cases.description: SQL Server nightly full backup job completed but verification failed with checksum corruption on backup set ID 88421. Database restore drill required before next maintenance window.

cases.title: SharePoint Document Library Sync Error
cases.description: SharePoint finance document library fails to sync in OneDrive with error 0x80070005 access denied. User had contributor access yesterday. File share / storage permissions issue.

cases.title: MFA Device Replacement
cases.description: User lost phone with Microsoft Authenticator app. Need MFA device reset and re-enrollment for corporate SSO login. Standard identity access request.

cases.title: AD Group Membership Change
cases.description: Please add jsmith@corp.com to the Engineering-Deploy AD security group for CI/CD pipeline access. Manager approved via email ticket ref #8821.

cases.title: Zscaler Blocking CI Pipeline
cases.description: Zscaler proxy is blocking Jenkins build agents from reaching the internal artifact repository. Builds fail with proxy authentication timeout. Network egress / firewall rule issue.
